tweet: restored 18 missing apps and reorganized the registry into 15 categories. migrated claude to direct api. also shipped an obsidian plugin and a tattoo designer. 24 prs merged. keeping the garden tidy.
alt_tweet: shipped a cli tool called 'fuckits', restored 18 missing apps, and moved claude to direct api. also added a d&d item generator. 24 prs merged. productive chaos.
